global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a mix of text and graphic elements.
global.main_message: Promoting flexible booking options for RouteBloom.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element featuring a circular shape and a rectangular shape, both outlined with a thin border.

elements.label: RouteBloom logo
elements.description: A logo text that reads 'RouteBloom' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Fly smarter Flexible booking options' in a clear, legible font, centrally placed in the ad.

elements.label: Watch now button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' in a bright color, positioned at the top right corner of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label that reads 'UGC' in a simple font, located at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
